calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Sherron Mills (Petitioner).

The Court noted that this is a request for interpretation of the will that the entire residue is going to the Petitioner/Beneficiary and that it seems reasonable. Mr. Conrad stated that he is not aware of anyone objecting. The Court granted the First and Final Report on Waiver of Accounting, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Court also allows payment of the creditor's claim in the amount of $29,608.84.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
